text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I need to lie down on the sofa.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Nothing. Even an honor student like myself needs
a break every once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...And since it's just you here, this place is perfect.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'm gonna be here for a bit. Now go get
back to your work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Daiwa Scarlet is worn out... I'll have
to make sure I don't push her too hard.
